blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
